code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = io.read_line().ok_or("failed to read line 1")?
  let line2 = io.read_line().ok_or("failed to read line 2")?

  let parts1 = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  let parts2 = string.split_whitespace(line2)

  mut i = 0
  while i < parts1.len()
    let s1 = parts1.get(i).ok_or("index out of bounds")?
    let s2 = parts2.get(i).ok_or("index out of bounds")?
    let n1 = string.parse_int(s1).ok_or("parse error")?
    let n2 = string.parse_int(s2).ok_or("parse error")?
    let sum = n1 + n2
    println("#{n1}+#{n2}=#{sum}")
    i = i + 1
  end
  Ok(())
end
